question_text:
A multi-step chemical synthesis is described below.

Initial compound:
C=C(C)[C@H]1CC=C(C)CC1

Step 1 conditions:
1) H2, Pd/C; 2) O3, CH2Cl2, −78°C; 3) Me2S; 4) MeOH, p-TsOH (cat.)

Step 2 conditions:
1) NaH, CCOP(=O)(CC(=O)N(C)OC)OCC, then MeLi; 2) HCl

Step 3 conditions:
1) Zr(On-Pr)4; 2) H2, Pd/C, then LiHMDS, PhNTf2; 3) LiBr, Zn, Ni(OAc)2

Step 4 conditions:
C=C1[C@H]2CC[C@]1(C=O)CC[C@@H]2C, 450 nm LEDs, NiBr2,
Ir[dF(CF3)ppy]2(dtbbpy)PF6

Step 5 conditions:
1) Fe(acac)3, polymethylhydrosiloxane;
2) Cu(OAc)2, TEMPO, bpy, m-CPBA

Step 6 conditions:
1) m-CPBA;
2) TMSCH2Li then KHMDS;
3) N2H4·H2O, FeCl3;
4) Cp2TiCl2, Zn

Task:
Determine the ordered sequence of reaction products (in SMILES format)
formed after each step of the synthesis.
Provide the SMILES separated by commas in the correct order.

3) TMSCH2MgCl, Pd(PPh3)4, then NaIO4

Step 2 conditions:
1) TMSOTf, Et3N;
2) Na;
3) IBX

Step 2 conditions:
1) TEMPO, KBr, NaOCl, NaHCO3, CH2Cl2, H2O, 0°C;
2) C=CP(Br)(c1ccccc1)(c1ccccc1)c1ccccc1, NaH, MeCN/THF, rt

Step 3 conditions:
1) Li-naphthalide, THF, −78°C;
2) PTSA, CH2Cl2, rt, then peracetic acid, 0°C → rt;
3) BF3·OEt2, BzOH, DCE, −40°C,
then Na2CO3 (aq.), methyl chloroformate, 0°C → rt

Step 2 conditions:

Step 3 conditions:

NiS, 4Å MS, AgOTf, CH2Cl2, −40°C;

HFIP/DMSO, Et4N·FSO3, (+)RVC/(-)RVC

1) TPAP, NMO, MeCN, rt;
2) DMAP, HOTT, Et3N, MeCN/CCl4

then k) TsOH

Methylene blue, O2, hν

A multi-step chemical synthesis is described below.

Initial compound:
O=C(O)[C@@H]1CCCN1

Step 1 conditions:
1) CDX-090 (hydroxylase), alpha-ketoglutarate, ascorbate,
ammonium iron(II) sulfate, phosphate buffer pH 7, air;
then Na2CO3, Boc2O
2) TBSCl, Im, DMAP, CH2Cl2, rt;
then DIC, DMAP, NHPI

Step 2 conditions:
Cc5cc(C)c(S(=O)/N=C/[C@@H](COCc1ccccc1)NC(=O)OCC4c2ccccc2c3ccccc34)c(C)c5,
NiCl2·glyme, Zn, DMF, rt

Step 3 conditions:
HCl, dioxane;
then NaHCO3, rt;
then CS/C(=N\C(=O)OC(C)(C)C)NC(=O)OC(C)(C)C,
HgO, Et3N, CH2Cl2, rt

Step 4 conditions:
piperidine

Step 5 conditions:
TEMPO, NaOCl, KBr, NaHCO3, CH2Cl2/H2O, 0°C;
then PIFA, rt

Step 6 conditions:
BCl3, CH2Cl2, 0°C

Step 7 conditions:
Chlorosulfonyl isocyanate (CSI), HCO2H, 5°C;
then MeOH, 0°C

Step 8 conditions:
Pd(OH)2, H2, acetone, rt;
then ICH2COOH, DMAP, EDC, CH2Cl2

Step 9 conditions:
CC(C)(C)N=P(N1CCCC1)(N2CCCC2)N3CCCC3, CH2Cl2, rt

Step 10 conditions:
HCl aq., 50°C;
CSI, HCO2H, 5°C;
then MeOH, 0°C
